name: OctoTrip Rental Cars
description: Free rental car search with real-time pricing from multiple providers worldwide. No API key required. Booking links contain affiliate attribution.
author: OctoTrip

tools.name: search
tools.description: Searches live rental-car offers for a pickup location and rental period. Use this when the user wants to compare available rental cars, prices, vendors, categories, or booking links. The tool queries external provider APIs in real time and may include affiliate booking links. It does not book cars, modify reservations, charge users, or store user data.

location.description: Pickup location, such as a city, airport, station, address, or landmark.

pickup_date.description: Pickup date. Accepts common date formats such as YYYY-MM-DD, DD.MM.YYYY, or natural-language dates.

dropoff_date.description: Dropoff date. Must be after the pickup date.

dropoff_location.description: Optional different dropoff location. If omitted, the pickup location is used.

pickup_time.description: Pickup time in 24-hour HH:MM format. Defaults to 12:00.

dropoff_time.description: Dropoff time in 24-hour HH:MM format. Defaults to 12:00.

currency.description: Preferred ISO 4217 currency code for prices, such as EUR, USD, or GBP. Defaults to EUR.

language.description: Preferred response language code, such as en or de. Defaults to en.

age.description: Driver age. Defaults to 30. Younger drivers may incur surcharges.
